packageRules.description: Batch all non-major updates into one weekly PR.
Pinning to a SHA keeps the SAME version you already run (just hardened), so it's not subject to the new-version stability delay — let it merge immediately.
Go module updates ship in the binary, so commit them as fix(deps) — each merged one cuts a patch release. Open a PR for review (no auto-merge).

GitHub Actions are CI tooling, not part of the binary — keep chore(deps) (no release). Auto-merge once CI passes, including the initial SHA pin and digest refreshes (actions are SHA-pinned via helpers:pinGitHubActionDigests).
asdf-pinned dev tools — chore(deps) (no release); auto-merge patch updates.
